summary: Completed backend testing for duplicate IBAN handling and new IBAN update endpoint. All tests passed successfully after fixing bugs.

fixed_bugs.issue: Unique IBAN constraint still present in MongoDB
fixed_bugs.location: backend/database.py line 140 and MongoDB bank_accounts collection
fixed_bugs.fix: Removed unique constraint from database.py and dropped iban_1 index from MongoDB

fixed_bugs.issue: Incorrect audit_log parameters in update_user_account_iban endpoint
fixed_bugs.fix: Fixed create_audit_log call to use correct parameters (metadata instead of old_value/new_value/ip_address)

passed_tests: Duplicate IBAN allowed in KYC approval - Two users approved with same IBAN (IT60X0542811101000000123456)
IBAN format validation working (rejects invalid formats)
BIC format validation working (rejects invalid formats)
